extensions.title: Document Browser
extensions.description: Browse open documents in a detached, resizable, closable window.

extensions.title: JSON Formatter
extensions.description: Format JSON documents with stable indentation and sorted keys.

extensions.description: Save and reuse text clipboard content across 10 named slots.
